name: Brain Tumor Classification
description: This project implements a neural network model that classifies brain tumors from MRI scans. It aims to assist medical professionals in making accurate diagnoses.

name: Sentiment Analysis of Movie Reviews
description: A logistic regression model is implemented from scratch for binary sentiment analysis on movie reviews. The project uses Python and Numpy for all computations.

name: PulseGrip
description: PulseGrip is a rehabilitation tool that uses EMG sensors and Unity games to help stroke patients regain finger mobility. It was a finalist at Hack the North 2024.

name: EMG-controlled Steering Wheel
description: This project features an EMG-controlled steering system designed for double-arm amputees. It uses Arduino and custom signal processing circuits for control.

name: Lung Disease Detection
description: This project involves using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to classify 3 lung diseases from lung X-ray images.

name: Flash Brain
description: Flash Brain is an AI-powered tool that generates flashcards from user content and PDFs. It helps students study efficiently by automating flashcard creation.

name: Toastmasters Website
description: I developed a React website for a Toastmasters club, integrating Supabase for backend and authentication. The site streamlines club management and member access.

name: Autonomous Robot
description: This project involves programming a Turtlebot 4 to autonomously navigate a course and detect road signs using YOLOv5. It demonstrates advanced robotics and computer vision.

name: Booking App
description: The Booking App is a Flutter application for managing community hall bookings. It features real-time data synchronization using Cloud Firestore.

name: Temperature and Humidity Monitoring
description: This project simulates and uploads temperature and humidity data to InfluxDB hosted on AWS EC2. The data is visualized using Grafana dashboards.

name: Parking Management System
description: A full-stack Python application for managing parking lots. It features a GUI built with tKinter and uses MySQL for data storage.
